rulings.Case Title: DAMIEN QUINN VS. BELLROSE, LLC ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for October, 22, 2020, Line 1, CROSS DEFENDANT ANDREW CHIU DEMURRER to COMPLAINT is sustained with leave to amend for Plaintiff to allege each cause of action against each defendant in clear and concise language and with requisite specificity. The Court suggests that in addition to (or instead of) the general allegations Plaintiff shall include relevant facts as to each defendant within each cause of action asserted against that particular defendant. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: DAMIEN QUINN VS. BELLROSE, LLC ET AL

rulings.Case Title: JURGEN KLOCKEMANN ET AL VS. DENNIS S ROSARIO ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion & Motion For Order To Stay Proceedings In Pending Action Until Arbitration Is Completed
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for October, 22, 2020, Line 2, DEFENDANT 1250 HOMEOWNERS ASSOCIATION, DENNIS ROSARIO, KATHERINE ROSARIO, JAMES FLETCHER, JUDITH FLETCHER Notice Of Motion & Motion For Order To Stay Proceedings In Pending Action Until Arbitration Is Completed is moot. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: JURGEN KLOCKEMANN ET AL VS. DENNIS S ROSARIO ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for October, 22, 2020, Line 2, DEFENDANT 1250 HOMEOWNERS ASSOCIATION, DENNIS ROSARIO, KATHERINE ROSARIO, JAMES FLETCHER, JUDITH FLETCHER Defendants Petition To Compel Arbitration is DENIED. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: TAL N. TAMIR ET AL VS. LEM HOLDINGS, LLC ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Petition And Petition To Compel Contractual Arbitration And To Stay Action, In Lieu Of Answer
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for October, 22, 2020, Line 3, DEFENDANT LEM HOLDINGS, LLC, CIARAN HARTY, PATRICK HARTY Notice Of Petition And Petition To Compel Contractual Arbitration And To Stay Action, In Lieu Of Answer is GRANTED. Parties to the contract containing the arbitration clause at issue shall proceed to arbitration. The rest of the action is stayed pending arbitration. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: ANNA ESTRADA VS. SALLY LIU ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for October, 22, 2020, Line 4, DEFENDANT SALLY LIU DEMURRER to COMPLAINT is sustained with leave to amend to address in good faith all issues raised by demurrer. Plaintiff's opposition is stricken. Plaintiff failed to comply with SFLR 2.7B and Court's September 23, 2020 Minute Order regarding compliance with SFLR 2.7B. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: MARTIN HOGAN VS. MO LIAN CHAN ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for October, 22, 2020, Line 5, DEFENDANT TO NHI TAT, MO CHAN DEMURRER to COMPLAINT is sustained with leave to amend for Plaintiff to allege facts, not conclusions, showing the requisite relationship between the parties for the purposes of an unlawful detainer cause of action. Further, facts supporting claim of exemption from SFRO protections shall be alleged. =(501/CFH)
